{{Quote|Yes. Mourn is what I do. Don't you think I know what you all think of me? Vook the mournful. Vook the always sad. Poor old Vook. Well, I'm tired of it. If my choice is to be between misery and anger, I'll take the anger, sir. It feels better.|Vook Gehu to [[Uldir Lochett]]|<ref name="Emissary of the Void">"[[Emissary of the Void]]"</ref>}}
The [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] '''Vook Gehu''' was a member of [[Uldir Lochett]]'s crew aboard the rescue starship ''[[No Luck Required]]''. His natural dourness was only intensified following the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] conquest of his [[Duro/Legends|homeworld]] and the death of his [[Tyro Gehu|uncle]].
